name: Macro Safeguard
description: Macro Safeguard: Automatically records attempts when beating personal bests.

only-new-best.name: Save on New Best Only
only-new-best.description: When enabled, records only when beating your high score. Turn off to use custom percentage.

custom-percentage.name: Custom Percentage Threshold
custom-percentage.description: Minimum percentage required to save the recording (only if 'Save on New Best' is off).
